final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [2:0] count
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk, posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 3'b0;
        end else begin
            if (count == 3'b111) begin
                count <= 3'b0;
            end else begin
                count <= count + 1;
            end
        end
    end

endmodule
